entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A cash crop and food source grown in diverse agroenvironments, particularly in semi-arid tropical areas

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions characterized by specific agroclimatological characteristics where groundnut is a significant crop

entities.name: SUBSISTENCE FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems where groundnut serves as both a food source and a cash crop

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country producing 52% of the combined groundnut output of all semi-arid tropical countries

entities.name: RAINFED DRYLAND CONDITIONS
entities.description: The primary environmental conditions under which groundnuts are cultivated

entities.name: AFRICAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: A region where groundnuts are grown specifically on Alfisols and Oxisols

entities.name: ALFISOLS
entities.description: A type of soil found in the African subcontinent used for groundnut cultivation

entities.name: OXISOLS
entities.description: A type of soil found in the African subcontinent used for groundnut cultivation

entities.name: AVAILABLE-WATER HOLDING CAPACITY
entities.description: The capacity of groundnut soils to hold water in the root profile, generally ranging from low to medium

entities.name: ANNUAL RAINFALL
entities.description: Precipitation levels, varying from 400-1500 mm in Indian groundnut-growing areas

entities.name: NORTHERN INDIA
entities.description: A region with unimodal rainfall where groundnuts are grown from June to September

entities.name: SOUTH INDIA
entities.description: A region with bimodal rainfall where groundnut cultivation is possible almost year-round

entities.name: SAHELIAN WEST AFRICA
entities.description: A region where groundnut is cultivated in a narrow belt between 10-15 deg N latitude

entities.name: GROWING SEASONS
entities.description: The period of crop growth in the semi-arid tropics, typically short, lasting 75-110 days

entities.name: INTERMITTENT DROUGHT PERIODS
entities.description: Characteristic weather patterns in the semi-arid tropical groundnut-growing areas

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: The amount of water in the surface soil, which is restricted during seed formation and maturity

entities.name: SEED FORMATION
entities.description: A growth stage of the groundnut crop where restricted soil moisture can cause problems

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: A growth stage of the groundnut crop where restricted soil moisture can cause problems

entities.name: POD DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of pod growth in groundnuts, which can be hindered by restricted soil moisture

entities.name: GROUNDNUT YIELDS
entities.description: The total productivity of groundnut crops, which can be significantly reduced by rainfall failure

entities.name: FAILURE OF SEASONAL RAINFALL
entities.description: An event occurring approximately once every 3 years in the semi-arid tropics that reduces groundnut yields
